title: STOP Using Claude to Code. Do THIS Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese argues that Claude Code is not just for coding but should be treated as the foundation for a personal AI operating system that learns user behavior and compounds in capability over time. He frames this as shifting from renting AI services to owning integrated AI workflows, and demonstrates scaling approaches from individual to team level.
